maneuver.description: Modifies Coordinate. Choose one ally within 2 zones. That ally gains +1 Power and +1 Defense until end of round.

gambit.name: Direct Fire
gambit.description: Instead of attacking, one ally within 2 zones immediately makes an attack at +1 Power.

exploit.name: Last Stand
exploit.trigger: The Support drops below half Vitality.
exploit.description: All allies within 2 zones gain +1 Power until end of next round. Once per scene.

threatBuild.notes: Commander. Resist 5. (Recurring — same stat block as Scene 3.)

npcs.name: Stormtrooper Squad
npcs.notes: Securing the hangar. Professional and lethal.

npcEffects.legendary: Chassis damage + [Suppressed] to all enemies in the target's zone

maneuver.name: Dig In
maneuver.description: Modifies Take Cover. Anchor gains [Cover 2] and [Optimized] on its next ranged attack. Cannot move this turn.

gambit.name: Pinning Barrage
gambit.description: In addition to normal effects, target gains [Suppressed] Tactical. Target cannot use Move next turn.

exploit.name: Covering Fire
exploit.trigger: An ally in the Anchor's zone or an adjacent zone takes damage.
exploit.description: Immediately make an attack at -2 Power against the attacker if in weapon range.

threatBuild.notes: Standard Stormtrooper minions. Same as Adv1. Power 3. Defense 4. Masterful+ = takedown.

scenes.hazards: Open hangar bay. Tibanna gas crates (explosive if hit). Collapsing ceiling from Varga's escape. Stormtrooper crossfire.

decisions.choice: Fight to the ship and pursue Varga
decisions.consequence: Can get a trajectory lock on Varga's escape vector. Leads to Cloud City.

decisions.choice: Eliminate Lady Sinde and the Stormtroopers
decisions.consequence: Removes Imperial witnesses but costs time. Varga gets further away.

narrativeLinks.note: Varga flees to Cloud City, setting up the entire Adventure 3 pursuit.

encounters.name: Hangar Bay Firefight
encounters.description: Lady Sinde's Stormtroopers are eliminating witnesses. 8 troopers in firing positions behind crates.
encounters.tactics: Stormtroopers use Tibanna crates as cover. Shooting the crates causes explosions — area damage but clears positions.

environmentMechanics.name: Tibanna Gas Crates
environmentMechanics.effect: Explosive decompression. [Hazard 3] in the zone. Destroys cover.
environmentMechanics.mitigation: Don't shoot near the crates. Or do — area denial works both ways.

environmentMechanics.name: Collapsing Ceiling
environmentMechanics.effect: Rubble blocks sections of the hangar. Difficult terrain. Some paths completely blocked.
environmentMechanics.mitigation: Athletics to climb over. Tech to find alternate routes.

environmentMechanics.name: Open Air Hangar
environmentMechanics.effect: Takodana jungle visible below. Falls from the platform are survivable but result in a 2-scene delay.
environmentMechanics.mitigation: Stay away from the edges.

rewards.narrative: Escape from Varga's fortress. Trajectory to Bespin/Cloud City. Raden executed by Varth. The adventure ends in hyperspace with two red flags and a dead man's memory.

pacing.openingBeat: Burst through blast doors into the hangar. Varga's yacht is already lifting off.
pacing.risingAction: Stormtroopers open fire. Crates explode. Ceiling collapses.
pacing.climax: Varth executes Raden on the ramp. The sprint to the ship under fire.
pacing.resolution: Liftoff. Hyperspace. Silence. Varth's trajectory lock on Bespin.

disciplineChallenges.context: Firefight across the hangar bay.

control.failure: Pinned by return fire. [Suppressed] for 1 round. The troopers are disciplined and well-positioned.
control.mastery: You hit the Tibanna crate next to the Stormtrooper position. Controlled detonation. Two troopers go down and the rest are forced to relocate — the firefight is effectively over.

effect.fleeting: Suppressive fire forces the Stormtroopers behind cover. They're not down but they're not shooting at you either. Brief window to move.
effect.masterful: Accurate fire. One Stormtrooper drops. The rest adjust positions — the suppression advantage shifts to you.
effect.legendary: Precision shooting. Two Stormtroopers eliminated in rapid succession. The remaining two break formation. Sinde orders a retreat to secondary positions — the hangar approach is open.

disciplineChallenges.context: Hot-wiring the heroes' ship or bypassing hangar controls.

control.failure: Delayed launch. 2 additional rounds under fire. Every round is hull damage.
control.mastery: Ship online instantly AND you boost the shields before launch. First volley of Stormtrooper fire splashes harmlessly against the deflectors.

effect.fleeting: Systems come online one by one — slow but steady. Engines are last. 1 extra round before you can lift.
effect.masterful: Ship systems online. Ready for launch. Standard power-up sequence completed under fire.
effect.legendary: Emergency hot-start. Ship goes from cold to flight-ready in seconds. You're lifting before the Stormtroopers even realize the engines are live.

disciplineChallenges.context: Launching under heavy fire with Stormtroopers targeting the ship.

control.failure: Ship takes hits during liftoff. Hull damage. Emergency repairs needed in hyperspace.
control.mastery: Perfect launch AND you buzz Sinde's position on the way out — close enough to scatter her squad. She dives behind a crate. Satisfying.

effect.fleeting: Rough liftoff. A couple of glancing hits but nothing critical. You clear the hangar with singed hull plating.
effect.masterful: Clean launch. Break atmosphere. The blaster fire tracks behind you but nothing connects.
effect.legendary: Textbook combat liftoff. You use the hangar structure as cover during the ascent, then punch to orbit in a spiral that makes targeting impossible. Zero hits.

disciplineChallenges.context: Tracking Varga's escape trajectory.

control.failure: Lost him. Must rely entirely on Gome's intel to find Varga. Less certainty about the destination.
control.mastery: Full trajectory lock AND you identify the specific hyperspace lane. Cross-referencing with Gome's intel: Cloud City, Bespin, Figg & Associates. Dead certain.

effect.fleeting: Partial sensor data — the escape vector points toward the Anoat Sector. Consistent with Gome's Bespin intel but not conclusive.
effect.masterful: Partial trajectory lock. The vector aligns with the Anoat Sector. Bespin. Cloud City. Confirmed by Gome's banking intel.
effect.legendary: Full trajectory lock with exit vector and hyperspace lane identified. You know exactly where Varga is going, which route he's taking, and approximately when he'll arrive. The pursuit can be surgical.

disciplineChallenges.context: Sprinting across the open hangar to the ship.

control.failure: Stumble or take fire. Slowed. Arrive at the ship winded and exposed.
control.mastery: You cross the open ground so fast that you arrive at the ship ahead of everyone and can provide covering fire for the rest of the team.

effect.fleeting: Head-down sprint. You make it across but a blaster bolt clips your shoulder — minor wound but you're at the ship.
effect.masterful: Full speed. Reach the ship cleanly. No hits taken.
effect.legendary: Olympic sprint across the kill zone. You dodge, weave, and vault a cargo crate without breaking stride. You're up the ramp and at the controls before the Stormtroopers can adjust their aim.

append.gmNotes: DENIA RESCUED ENDING: She is weak and confused — doesn't know where she is or what year it is. She doesn't know the Empire exists yet.
DENIA ABANDONED ENDING: The ship is quiet. Varth says nothing about the woman they left in the dungeon. He has already sent a coded message to Draco.
